evals.prompt: Cree un Short YouTube GeoAfrique sur Mansa Musa et son pelerinage a la Mecque
assertions: Audio is generated BEFORE storyboard (Phase 1 before Phase 3)
timing.json exists before any clip generation
Gemini storyboard prompt includes NO TEXT constraint explicitly
I2V prompts use dynamic action verbs, not atmospheric/subtle
clip_duration matches beat duration (10s for beats > 7s)
OffthreadVideo used instead of Video in Remotion component
Text overlays are Remotion post-production, not in source frames
Checkpoint presented to user after audio, storyboard, clips, and assembly

evals.prompt: Produis un Short sur le royaume du Kongo avec une scene de carte geographique
assertions: GEO beat identified from script and handled differently
Map frame generated by Gemini without any text/labels
Two options proposed for GEO beat: I2V animation or Remotion SVG
If Remotion SVG: uses d3-geo with CSS transform zoom, not d3 re-projection
Pipeline order respected: audio first, timing second, visuals third

evals.prompt: J'ai deja un script pret pour un Short sur Tombouctou. Voici le texte: [script]. Produis le Short.
assertions: Script accepted as direct input without requiring youtube-scriptwriting
Script analyzed for beat structure before proceeding
Audio generation is the first production step
Palette derived from script tone, not hardcoded sepia/gold
